title: Maalai Mangum Neram Lyrics Rowthiram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Ranina Reddy
Lyrics: Thamarai 
Music: Prakash Nkki
Song: Maalai Mangum Neram
Movie: Rowthiram

Maalai Mangum Neram, Oru mogam kannin oram
Unnai parthukonde ninralum, podhum endru thondrum
Kaalai vandhal enna, veyil aetti parthaal enna
Kedikaram kaatum neram, adhai nammaba maaten naanum

Poongatrum porvai ketkum neram neram
Theeyaai maarum dhegam dhegam
Un kaigal ennai thottu podum kolam
Vazhvin ellai thaedum thaedum

Maalai Mangum Neram, Oru mogam kannin oram
Unnai parthukonde ninralum, podhum endru thondrum

Oru veetil namirundhu, orilayil nam virundhu
Iruthookam oru kanavil moolgi vazhkai thodangum
Nan samayal seidhiduven, ne anaithiduvai
En pasiyum un pasiyum sendhe onraai adangum

Naan ketu aasai patta paadal nooru,
Neeyum naanum senthe ketpom,
Thaalattai kaanil sonna anum neethan
Kalam neram, thaandi vazhvom...

Maalai Mangum Neram, Oru mogam kannin oram ..
..
Pal sindhum pournamiyil, naam nenaivom pani iravil
Nam moochuk kaaichalil,indha paniyum  nadungum
Veedengum un porutkal, asaindhaadum un udaigal
Thaniyaaga nan illai endre solli sinungum

Theendaamal theendi pogum vaadai katre
Thookam theerndhu naatkal aachu.
Un vaasam ennil pattum vaadi ponen,
Vaasam thoonnai naanum aanen,

Maalai Mangum Neram, Oru mogam kannin oram
Unnai parthukonde ninralum, podhum endru thondrum
Kaalai vandhal enna, veyil aetti parthaal enna
Kedikaram kaatum neram, adhai nammaba maaten naanum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Maalai Mangum Neram expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of being enamored with someone special.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Rowthiram, the song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Ranina Reddy, known for her melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Maalai Mangum Neram was composed by Prakash Nikki, who is recognized for his unique sound in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 19, 2011, as part of the movie Rowthiram.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maalai Mangum Neram, the protagonist reflects on their deep feelings of love and connection, making it a poignant melody in the film Rowthiram. The song's lyrics, penned by Thamarai, evoke a sense of nostalgia and romantic longing. With Ranina Reddy's enchanting vocals, the track beautifully conveys the emotions of love and the moments shared between lovers. It serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic scenes, enhancing the overall narrative of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maalai Mangum Neram from Rowthiram is a captivating melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Ranina Reddy's soulful voice and Thamarai's poignant lyrics, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The collaboration with music director Prakash Nikki adds a unique flavor, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: When the evening comes, with a beautiful face beside me, just seeing you is enough for me. When morning comes, what will happen if the sun shines? The time of the evening breeze, I won't let it go, not even I.
At the time when flowers bloom and the body changes, your hands touch me and create a beautiful form. Life searches for all its paths.
When the evening comes, with a beautiful face beside me, just seeing you is enough for me.
From one house to another, we feast in another place. Life begins with a dream, and I will cook for you, fulfilling all your needs. My hunger and your hunger will unite as one.
I have a hundred songs that I desire to hear, you and I will listen together. If I say it in a whisper, it is only you. Time will pass, and we will live on...

When the evening comes, with a beautiful face beside me... In the full moon, we remember in the rain. In our breath, this rain will also flow. Your belongings in the house will not be lonely, saying I am not alone.
The path that goes without a destination is now clear. The days have passed, and my burden has lifted. Your fragrance has caught me, and I have become that fragrance.

When the evening comes, with a beautiful face beside me, just seeing you is enough for me. When morning comes, what will happen if the sun shines? The time of the evening breeze, I won't let it go, not even I.
